spec_match.rationale: Correctly registers a Service Worker and shows the live difference between a speculation-rules prefetch (carrying Sec-Purpose: prefetch) and a standard navigation-simulated fetch.

interactive.rationale: Provides functional buttons to install/uninstall the SW, trigger speculation prefetch, and trigger a standard fetch, with real-time header interception logging.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the index page blurb perfectly, demonstrating live header interception and classification.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates both speculative and standard navigation fetches side-by-side to compare header states.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/4996410105397248 self-heal reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses proper CSS variables, layouts, and contrast.

summary: The previous reference-only critique has been resolved: the concept page now carries the canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link required by the repository rules.
